scripts.edge-demo: DATABASE_URL=${TEST_DATABASE_URL:-postgresql://multiagency:multiagency@localhost:5455/multiagency_test} BOT_TOKEN=000000:demo ADMIN_IDS=1 BOT_USERNAME=DemoBot NEAR_AI_API_KEY= NOTIFY_RATE_PER_SEC=1000 tsx scripts/edge-demo.ts
scripts.rooms-demo: DATABASE_URL=${TEST_DATABASE_URL:-postgresql://multiagency:multiagency@localhost:5455/multiagency_test} BOT_TOKEN=000000:demo ADMIN_IDS=1 BOT_USERNAME=DemoBot NEAR_AI_API_KEY=demo-stub SIGNAL_MAX_PER_HOUR=3 NOTIFY_RATE_PER_SEC=1000 tsx scripts/rooms-demo.ts
scripts.agent-tools-demo: DATABASE_URL=${TEST_DATABASE_URL:-postgresql://multiagency:multiagency@localhost:5455/multiagency_test} BOT_TOKEN=000000:demo ADMIN_IDS=1 NEAR_AI_API_KEY= MAX_OPEN_APPLICATIONS=2 tsx scripts/agent-tools-demo.ts
scripts.web-smoke: DATABASE_URL=${TEST_DATABASE_URL:-postgresql://multiagency:multiagency@localhost:5455/multiagency_test} BOT_TOKEN=000000:demo ADMIN_IDS=1 ESCROW_CONTRACT_ID=escrow.agency.testnet NEAR_TREASURY_ID=agency.testnet tsx scripts/web-smoke.ts
scripts.preview: npm run build && DATABASE_URL=${TEST_DATABASE_URL:-postgresql://multiagency:multiagency@localhost:5455/multiagency_test} BOT_TOKEN=000000:demo ADMIN_IDS=1 tsx scripts/preview.ts
scripts.test: npm run typecheck && npm run web:typecheck && npm run build && npm run core-demo && npm run demo && npm run queue-demo && npm run edge-demo && npm run rooms-demo && npm run agent-tools-demo && npm run web-smoke
